Starting a Gradle Daemon (subsequent builds will be faster)

> Task :compileJava
> Task :processResources
> Task :classes
> Task :compileTestJava
> Task :processTestResources NO-SOURCE
> Task :testClasses
> Task :test

> Task :check
> Task :build
